name: Crawler
description: What is left when the legs are gone — it drags itself along the floor, low and quiet, and takes you by the ankle before you have seen it at all.
signature: low to the ground, half a body dragging itself — the thing you almost step over
notes: FR-CBT-07 (T46). The lowProfile tag drives the state machine (LOWPROFILE_DAMPEN): while the player is only near, it reads calmer than it is (you almost miss it); the damp lifts the instant you stand on it. Combat teeth (graspWound — an ankle sprain on the way out) live in enemy.crawler. Human-only canon: a person reduced to crawling, not an animal.
